Some sages like Kasyapa are of opinion that if there be rain
in a certain area at the beginning, there will be good rain in the
same place throughout the season; while others like Devala main-
tain that if there be rain over an area of ten Yojanas, there would
be good rain during the whole season. But, according to sages
Garga, Vasistha and Parasara good rain should be predicted only if
the rainfall be over an area that is not less than twelve Yojanas.

In whichever stars tnere is rain at the beginning, there will
generally be rain once again under the same stars in the season. If

there be no rain at all in any of the asterisms beginning with
Purvasadha at the time of delivery, then there would be no rain in
the season.
